# EMI Calculator
> Free online tool to calculate Equated Monthly Installments for any loan.

## What it does
Calculates monthly EMI (Equated Monthly Installment) for any loan using the standard amortization formula. Shows total interest paid, total payment, and a complete month-by-month repayment schedule.

## Features
- Instant EMI calculation using standard Price Table formula
- Interactive donut chart showing principal vs interest breakdown
- Full month-by-month amortization schedule
- CSV export of amortization data
- Multi-currency display (USD, INR, EUR, GBP, BRL, CAD, AUD)
- No registration required, no data sent to servers

## Who it's for
- Home buyers calculating mortgage payments
- Car buyers comparing auto loan options
- Students evaluating education loan costs
- Anyone comparing personal loan offers

## URL
https://loancalcemi.com

## How to use
Enter your loan amount, annual interest rate, and loan tenure in years. Results update instantly. Switch currencies if needed. Expand the amortization table to see the month-by-month breakdown, and export as CSV for your records.

## Pricing
Completely free. No account needed. No limits.
